name: research-task-system
description: TODO-centered, rule-driven human-governed research workflows with persistent YAML state, explicit self-transitions, exact rule-path approval, complete evidence, and researcher-reviewed scientific figures.

interface.shortDescription: Route rule-driven research across Work and Codex
interface.longDescription: Author one complete research TODO, maintain a versioned YAML lifecycle with explicit self-transitions and human-confirmed rule paths, execute Python or MATLAB research code, preserve complete evidence, curate tables, plan drafts covering all applicable data, obtain researcher feedback, and audit final figures without parallel scientific handoffs.
defaultPrompt: Use Research Task System to author complete TODO specifications from this research material.
Use Research Task System to initialize or inspect task state, evaluate all outgoing rules including self, and wait for human confirmation of one rule path.
Use Research Task System to execute the recorded state, including the separate figure planning, researcher review, and final QA states.
